title: Ancient Horizons: Medieval RPG
description: Get ready for a unique Medieval RPG modpack, featuring many new armors & tools. And also features, such as leveling, bosses, quests, dungeons and many more!
body:
![Banner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/34cc19c4f61822b13c7525103d4d44d10604707f.png)
_A medieval RPG modpack based on **Fabric**._ *** #
- 🏰 Start your adventure on a custom world generated by **[William Wythers' Expanded Ecosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/expanded-ecosphere).** - 🎨 Using resource packs designed specially for a medieval theme, such as **[Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen), [Mobs Refreshed](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/mobs-refreshed).** - 🧙‍♂️ New advanced spellcasting system using **[Wizards](https://modrinth.com/mod/wizards), [Paladins and Priests](https://modrinth.com/mod/paladins-and-priests), [Gazebos](https://modrinth.com/mod/gazebos), [Death Knights](https://modrinth.com/mod/death-knights).** - 🎒 Adding very useful backpacks to assist you in this adventure with **[Traveler's Backpack](https://modrinth.com/mod/travelersbackpack).** - 👹 Challenging bosses and creatures added by the mods **[Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere), [Bosses of Mass Destruction](https://modrinth.com/mod/bosses-of-mass-destruction), [Frostiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/frostiful).** - 📜 Adding simple quests that will reward you using **[VillagerQuests](https://modrinth.com/mod/villagerquests), [Bountiful](https://modrinth.com/mod/bountiful).** - 🌀 New way of transportation with the mod **[Waystones](https://modrinth.com/mod/waystones).** - ⚔️ Enhanced combat mechanics with **[Better Combat](https://modrinth.com/mod/better-combat).** - 💤 Realistic sleeping mechanics using **[Sleep Rework](https://modrinth.com/mod/sleep-rework).** - 🌍 Host your singleplayer worlds with **[e4mc](https://modrinth.com/mod/e4mc).** - ⚡ Optimized for smooth gameplay with full shader support using **[Iris](https://modrinth.com/mod/iris).** - 🔥 Over **250+** carefully integrated mods for the best user experience! ***
🔎F.A.Q - Q: **Will Ancient Horizons Come to Curseforge?** - ㅤㅤA: **No, It's Just a Mod Pack Based on Modrinth. It Will Never Come to Curseforge.** ㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤㅤ - Q: **Will Different Versions Be Ported to Ancient Horizons Mod Pack?** - ㅤㅤA: **No, it will only be in version 1.21.1**
*** #
# **Antique Runes Trailer**
Spoiler
***
#
- **[Ashen 16x](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/ashen)** Resource Pack used in this modpack, thanks to the creator of the resource pack. - **[Fyoncle](https://modrinth.com/user/Fyoncle)** – Logo & Banner Design - **[Galosphere](https://modrinth.com/mod/galosphere)** Mod used in this modpack, thanks to Orcinus for making this mod.
